mano_cua.result_summary: SSR功能正常工作（data-server-rendered=true，__NUXT__含自定义注入state:{test:✅}和config:{myValue:123}），但页面title显示'undefined – Nuxt Bridge Playground'，title变量未正确赋值
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Now I have a complete and clear view of the page source. Line 6: <title>undefined – Nuxt Bridge Playground</title> - BUG: Title contains 'undefined'. Line 38: <div data-server-rendered="true" id="__nuxt"> - SSR CONFIRMED. Lines 39-43: Page body contains 'Hello Vue 2!', 'State: 123', 'Rendered on server: true'. Line 51: window.__NUXT__ contains state:{test:"✅"}, serverRendered:true, config:{public:{myValue:123}} - Custom data injected via SSR hooks is working. Lines 26-35 show data-vue-ssr-id attributes confirming SSR is active. The SSR hooks appear to be working through Bridge's compatibility layer, but the page title shows 'undefined' indicating a bug in the title/meta configuration.
